title: Third Person Shooting: Zero
description: Makes TAC: Zero gunplay compatible with ShoulderSurfing mod.
body:
This mod makes TAC gunplay compatible with ShoulderSurfing mod.

features (4.x - 5.x):
---------------------

*   5.x is compatible with Shoulder Surfing 4.
*   Prepared for TaC: Zero.
*   Registers guns (when aiming) as ShoulderSurfing adaptive items
*   Aim down shoot will zoom in third person mode.
*   (4.x) Makes recoil work in shoulder surfing mode.
![](https://imgur.com/qCIEcHf.png)
